fields.Name: MJ_BizApps_Forms: Form Designer
fields.Description: System + user prompt for the Forms AI authoring Designer. Turns a natural-language brief (the {{ Brief }} parameter) into a structured FormBlueprint JSON object validated against the Phase-1 question taxonomy. Used by the 'Forms: Form Designer' AI Prompt.

fields.Name: Brief
fields.Description: The natural-language description of the form to design.

fields.Name: PreviousAttempt
fields.Description: Optional: the model's prior invalid output, fed back on a retry attempt.

fields.Name: ValidationError
fields.Description: Optional: the blueprint validation error from the prior attempt, fed back on a retry.
